title: stelis pudens
intro: Stelis pudens, also known as the 'Little Pleated Orchid', is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis pudens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antifungal properties, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Stelis pudens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
